testcase.name: @stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > hydrates, derives, expires, and clears frontend sessions
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > supports custom claim keys and invalid token fallbacks
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > derives tenant identifiers from fallback claims and empty claims
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > stores tokens in memory and browser-local storage variants
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > uses global localStorage when no storage provider is supplied
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > falls back to unavailable storage when global localStorage is absent
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > evaluates frontend authorization helpers case-insensitively
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > builds Cognito URLs and parses JWT payloads
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > sends StynxApiClient requests with auth, tenant, body, query, and response variants
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > surfaces StynxApiClient error responses
@stynx-web/sdk transport > injects bearer and tenant headers on requests
@stynx-web/sdk transport > preserves caller headers and omits empty query and tenant values
@stynx-web/sdk transport > omits empty query strings and forwards request signal options
@stynx-web/sdk transport > uses client method default options and parses empty or inferred JSON bodies
@stynx-web/sdk transport > refreshes once after a 401 and replays the request
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps response codes to typed error instances and calls onAuthFailure after unrecoverable 401
@stynx-web/sdk transport > preserves content-type headers and surfaces repeated 401 responses after refresh
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps remaining status codes and validation code suffixes
@stynx-web/sdk transport > surfaces network failures and preserves abort signals for caller cancellation
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps context payloads and 401 responses without an auth provider
@stynx-web/sdk transport > trimEdgeSlash strips ALL trailing slashes from baseUrl (kills Regex anchor mutations)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > buildQuery returns "" when query is undefined (kills StringLiteral at transport.ts:30)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > buildQuery prefixes "?" only when there are non-null params
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody returns undefined for empty body
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody detects JSON arrays by leading "[" (kills StringLiteral on the bracket literal)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody detects JSON objects by leading "{" (kills StringLiteral on the brace literal)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody returns raw string when body is non-JSON-shaped and no content-type
@stynx-web/sdk transport > isJsonResponse handles mixed-case content-type (kills MethodExpression .toLowerCase)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > hasHeader case-insensitivity (kills MethodExpression at transport.ts:44) > does not double-set Authorization when caller passes lowercase "authorization"
@stynx-web/sdk transport > hasHeader case-insensitivity (kills MethodExpression at transport.ts:44) > does not double-set x-tenant-id when caller passes mixed-case "X-Tenant-ID"
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody early-return on empty body (kills ConditionalExpression at transport.ts:57) > returns undefined for empty body even when content-type is application/json
@stynx-web/sdk transport > parseBody early-return on empty body (kills ConditionalExpression at transport.ts:57) > returns undefined for empty body without content-type
@stynx-web/sdk transport > resolveTenantId precedence (kills EqualityOperator at transport.ts:78) > explicit tenantId=null overrides the tenantProvider (kills `!== undefined` → `=== undefined`)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > resolveTenantId precedence (kills EqualityOperator at transport.ts:78) > explicit tenantId=undefined falls through to the tenantProvider

@stynx-web/sdk transport > refresh-and-replay sequence (kills ConditionalExpression survivors at transport.ts:133-141) > does NOT replay when refresh returns null — surfaces UnauthorizedError once (kills `if (refreshed)` mutation)

@stynx-web/sdk transport > refresh-and-replay sequence (kills ConditionalExpression survivors at transport.ts:133-141) > passes the parsed error body to onAuthFailure (kills BlockStatement {} at transport.ts:138)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > refresh-and-replay sequence (kills ConditionalExpression survivors at transport.ts:133-141) > does NOT call onAuthFailure when refresh succeeds and replay is OK
@stynx-web/sdk transport > body serialization + Content-Type (kills survivors at transport.ts:122-127) > serializes body via JSON.stringify and sets Content-Type when not provided
@stynx-web/sdk transport > body serialization + Content-Type (kills survivors at transport.ts:122-127) > does NOT set Content-Type when caller already provided one (case-insensitive)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > body serialization + Content-Type (kills survivors at transport.ts:122-127) > omits body when request.body is undefined (kills ConditionalExpression at transport.ts:122)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 401 → UnauthorizedError with status, message, code (kills L51 StringLiteral)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 403 → ForbiddenError with status (kills L54 EqualityOperator/ConditionalExpression)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 404 → NotFoundError
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 409 → ConflictError
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 429 → RateLimitError
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 400 → ValidationError (kills L67-68 EqualityOperator)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 422 → ValidationError (kills L68 status === 422 → !== 422 mutation)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 500 with code ending in _VALIDATION_ERROR → ValidationError (kills L69 StringLiteral suffix)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 500 with code NOT ending in _VALIDATION_ERROR → generic StynxSdkError, not ValidationError
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > 502 with no code → generic StynxSdkError (kills BlockStatement {} on 400/422 paths)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > falls back to "Request failed with status N" when payload has no message (kills L35 StringLiteral)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > falls back to default message when payload.message is empty string (kills L32 EqualityOperator length > 0)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > preserves payload.context when present and discards when absent (kills resolveContext branches)
@stynx-web/sdk transport > errors.ts createStynxSdkError per-class mapping > isObject rejects null payload (kills L28 LogicalOperator)
